case_title: OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC VS. CHOW OAKLAND, LLC DBA CHOW ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-30-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2019 CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) FOLLOWING TERMINATION OF BANKRUPTCY ON JUL-19-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-18-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-30-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) FOLLOWING TERMINATION OF BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
